subcodes.first_line: This is what hath descended from the heaven of the tender mercy of our Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. This is a Book that beareth witness unto that whereon ye both stand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ما نزل من سماء عنایه ربنا العلیم الحکیم هذا کتاب یشهد بما انتما علیه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
